project_type: Next.js 16 App Router SEO site with Prisma ORM, deployed on Vercel free tier
build_system: npm scripts, Next.js bundler. Build command uses inline DATABASE_URL for SQLite. No test framework configured.
test_framework: None - no test infrastructure exists. Validation is done via build success (next build) and lint (eslint).
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'npm run lint' to check for TypeScript/ESLint errors. 2. Run 'npm run build' to verify the Next.js production build succeeds. The build uses DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db inline.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/dev.db is the SQLite database bundled in the repo. Generated via 'npm run seed'. Prisma client is generated via 'npx prisma generate'.
setup_instructions: 1. npm install 2. npx prisma generate 3. npx prisma migrate dev 4. npm run seed (requires network for AniList API) 5. npm run dev
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access to npm, APIs, etc. Node.js 22 available via nvm. No Docker needed. Prisma + SQLite bundled in repo. Build must work with SQLite locally while supporting PostgreSQL in production via DATABASE_URL env var.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md says: This is NOT the Next.js you know - read docs in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code. Heed deprecation notices. Next.js 16 with App Router, React 19, TailwindCSS 4 (uses @import 'tailwindcss' and @theme inline).
key_patterns: 1. All pages use 'export const revalidate = N' for ISR. 2. Route params are Promise<{param}> (Next.js 16). 3. Prisma queries in Server Components directly. 4. JSON stored as strings in SQLite (genres, studios, episode lists). 5. generateStaticParams for SSG. 6. Content generated via src/lib/content-generator.ts. 7. Components: AnimeCard, Breadcrumbs, AdBanner, Header/Footer. 8. Dark theme only with gradient/glow aesthetic. 9. TailwindCSS 4 uses @theme inline block in globals.css instead of tailwind.config.js.
directory_structure: src/app/ - App Router pages and API routes. src/components/ - Reusable UI components. src/lib/ - Data fetching, Prisma client, content generation. scripts/ - Database seed script. prisma/ - Schema, migrations, dev.db. public/ - Static assets.
